title: Guatemalans can apply to the Chevening Scholarship from August 5
body: "Chevening is the UK government’s global scholarship programme, offering future leaders the opportunity to study in the United Kingdom. Funded by the Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office (FCDO) and partner organisations, Chevening Scholarships cover tuition fees, travel, accommodation, and living expenses for a one-year master’s degree at any UK university.   The application period for the 2026–2027 cycle is open from 5 August to 7 October, 2025. Applicants from Guatemala are encouraged to apply and take advantage of this life-changing opportunity to gain a world-class education, build international networks, and develop professionally and personally.   Applicants are free to choose any field of study, but they are responsible for identifying and applying to UK universities independently. It is important to note that the application to the Chevening Scholarship is separate from the application to the university. Candidates must secure admission to at least one eligible UK master’s programme to be considered for the scholarship.   For more information and to apply, visit the Chevening website. "
